sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35457" key="e)neuhmere/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνευημερέω</orth>, <sense id="n35457.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be lucky in,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τοῖς θεάτροις, τοῖς ὕδνοις,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.289d</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">665d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
